zh.Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾貝福 霍爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Boteler於1328年出生在英國藍卡爾貝福 霍爾時，他的父親William Boteler II20歲，母親Elizabeth15歲。他於1362年之後與Alice Plumpton在英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃林頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1400年1月之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國藍卡爾沃林頓。

zh-hans.Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾貝福 霍爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Boteler于1328年出生在英国藍卡爾貝福 霍爾时，他的父亲William Boteler II20岁，母亲Elizabeth15岁。他于1362年之后与Alice Plumpton在英国英格兰藍卡爾沃林頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1400年1月之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国藍卡爾沃林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Boteler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of leather bottles, from an agent derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bouteille ‘bottle’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Boteler was born in 1328, in Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England, his father, William Boteler II, was 20 and his mother, Elizabeth, was 15. He married Alice Plumpton after 1362, in Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died before January 1400, in his hometown, and was buried in Warrington, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Boteler est né en 1328, à Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, William Boteler II, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Alice Plumpton après 1362, à Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé avant janvier 1400, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Boteler 1328 in Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Boteler II 20 und seine Mutter Elizabeth 15. Er hat nach 1362 in Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Alice Plumpton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb vor Januar 1400 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Warrington, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Boteler è nato il nel 1328 nel Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, William Boteler II, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Alice Plumpton dopo il 1362, nel Warrington, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì prima del gennaio 1400, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Warrington, Lancashire, England.

ja.Bewsey, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアベウセイ
ja.Warrington, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアワーリントン
ja.Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイア
ja.Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアベウセイ ハル
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Botelerが1328年にイギリスランカシュアイアベウセイ ハルで生まれた時，父William Boteler IIは20歳，母Elizabethは15歳であった。1362年以後にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアワーリントンでAlice Plumptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1400年1月以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアワーリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Boteler(이)가 1328년 영국 랭카실르 뷰시 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Boteler II(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1362년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 워링턴에서 Alice Plumpton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1400년 1월 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 워링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Boteler nasceu em 1328, em Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Boteler II, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Plumpton após 1362, em Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu antes janeiro de 1400, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Boteler родился в 1328 г. в местности бюси холл, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Boteler II было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Plumpton после 1362 г. в местности варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер перед январь 1400 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия.

sm.from about 1377 to 1385: mai le e tusa o le 1377 e o'o I le 1385

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Boteler nació en 1328, en Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Boteler II, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Elizabeth, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Alice Plumpton después de 1362, en Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió antes de enero de 1400, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
